title: helianthemum apenninum f. roseum
intro: Helianthemum apenninum f. roseum, also known as Rock Rose or Alpine Rose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The Rock Rose plant is also rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, offering various health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress, and promoting a healthy immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
